scope: Latest best TileLang sparse-MLA dKV candidate and attempted TorchTitan e2e TFLOPs measurement.

best_tilelang_candidate.read: Best production-shaped TileLang candidate is the BF16 HSK-source selected-limit dKV producer. It is slightly slower than packed kernel-only but avoids the SKH permute/cast feed shape, making it the current backend to wire into TorchTitan.

latest_successful_e2e_baseline_non_tilel.shape: 8xMI350 TP1_PP1_CP1_FSDP8_EP8 MBS1 GBS128 S4096 full activation checkpoint

attempts.blocker: TileLang image missing TorchTitan runtime dependency tyro
TorchTitan common attention imports require newer PyTorch attention helpers
init_process_group private _ranks kwarg unsupported in this PyTorch build

attempts.shape: 4xMI350 visible GPUs 2,3,4,5 FSDP4 EP4 GBS64 S4096
attempts.blocker: DeviceMesh._unflatten unsupported in this PyTorch build

attempts.blocker: FSDP private symbol ShardPlacementResult missing from torch.distributed.fsdp._fully_shard._fsdp_common

e2e_measurement.decision: Do not report a TileLang e2e TFLOPs number yet. The best kernel candidate is ready, but the available TileLang-capable image is not TorchTitan e2e-compatible with this WIP source. Use a PyTorch/TorchTitan image that already matches the retained nexus runtime and add TileLang there, or rebuild the TileLang DSv4 image against the retained PyTorch runtime.
